title: Ripples of the Past: C-Moon Addon
description: An Addon that adds C-Moon to Ripples of the Past.
body:
![C-Moon Main Photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dde78e3502e0012ba6254ef60cf7d84467fd3b32.png)
# A Ripples of the Past addon that adds C-Moon.
A Minecraft mod that adds a C-Moon to [Ripples of the Past](https://modrinth.com/mod/ripples-of-the-past/versions) obtainable through Stand Arrow 

## Abilities
### Left Click Hotbar:
- Punch (Shift: Heavy Punch) 
- Barrage (Shift: Heavy Punch)
- Finisher: Heart Inversion
### Right Click Hotbar:
- Block (Shift Variation: Gravity Counter)
- Center of Gravity
- Destroy => like old "Attack Him" system
- Gravitational Shift
